assertion: for each repo: workflow node joined by attributes.n8n_id to a cloud: workflow node, attributes.node_count must match (structural count-conservation); separately, source_commit-time must align (versioning) only when both provenances are git-resolvable
source_of_truth_ref: repo is authoritative for the deployed config — a cloud-side divergence selects reconcile (redeploy to match repo)
